empty.title: No orders yet
empty.subtitle: Your orders will appear here once you start ordering.

signedOut.title: Sign in to view orders
signedOut.body: Your past orders will appear here after you sign in.

info.title: Transfer payment to
info.subtitle: Send the order total to one of the accounts below, then upload the receipt.
info.contactTitle: Contact the restaurant for payment details
info.contactBody: Reach out via order chat to request the bank or wallet number, then upload the receipt below.

receipt.notReadyBody: The receipt will be available once the order is processed.
receipt.expiredBody: The download link expired. Please try again.
receipt.unauthorizedBody: Please sign in again to view the receipt.
receipt.networkBody: Check your connection and try again.
receipt.openFailedBody: No app is available to view this file.

rating.openRatingBody: Tell us how the food and delivery went
rating.commentPlaceholder: Tell us more about your experience…
rating.requiredHint: Please rate both food and delivery to submit.
rating.thanksBody: We'll share it with the restaurant.
rating.notDelivered: You can rate the order once it has been delivered.
rating.network: We couldn't reach the server. Check your connection.
rating.genericError: Could not submit your rating. Please try again.

paymentProof.title: Upload payment receipt
paymentProof.subtitle: Send us a photo of your transfer receipt to confirm payment (max 5 MB).
paymentProof.tooLargeBody: Please choose an image under 5 MB.
paymentProof.permissionRequiredBody: Allow photo access to upload your receipt.

driver.pickerSubtitle: Drivers shown are online near your address, sorted by distance.
driver.emptyBody: No drivers are available right now. We'll assign one as soon as someone is online.

waiting.title: Waiting for the restaurant
waiting.body: We'll notify you as soon as the restaurant confirms.

accepted.title: Order accepted
accepted.body: The restaurant is preparing your order.

ready.title: Ready for pickup
ready.body: Pick up your order from the restaurant.

rejected.title: Order rejected
rejected.body: Unfortunately the restaurant could not accept this order.

rate.title: How was your order?
rate.subtitle: Your feedback helps the restaurant improve.

chat.title: Order chat
chat.openBody: Talk to the restaurant or driver
chat.emptyBody: Ask the restaurant or driver anything about this order.

tracking.title: Live tracking
tracking.openTrackingBody: See the driver on the map
tracking.waiting: Waiting for the driver to start sharing location…

noLocation.title: Delivery location not available
noLocation.body: This order doesn't have a pinned delivery location, so live tracking can't be shown.

chat.title: Order chat
chat.emptyBody: Messages between you and the restaurant or driver will appear here.
